title: exit code improvements
body:
Please refer to the individual commits for change descriptions.  I am fairly confident it'll fix https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14859 but lets see what CI (and long-term flakes) tell.

@mheon PTAL

No release notes needed as it's fixing unreleased issue.
```release-note
None
```
